# taikun_group (Resource)

Taikun Group



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (Number) Account ID the group belongs to.
- `name` (String) Group's name.

### Optional

- `claim_value` (String) Claim value for the group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
